entries.title: flock signal spend cap
entries.body: The meme-contest crawler had no hard ceiling on API spend. It now stops itself at a fixed monthly cap.

entries.title: sweep content screen
entries.body: The box was auto-forwarding whatever landed in it without checking what a token was named. New screen checks token names before anything gets swept out, and we went back through recent history to lock down what the old screen missed.

entries.title: 9:41 run reliability
entries.body: Today's scheduled run silently did not fire -- root cause: the scheduler only ran while a desktop session was active. New watchdog now checks in at 9:55 and speaks up if a run or an update setting looks wrong.
